title: ilex scopulorum var. crassifolia
intro: Ilex scopulorum var. crassifolia, also known as Rocky Mountain holly, is a shrub or small tree that belongs to the holly family and is native to the western United States and Canada. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful for treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Ilex scopulorum var. crassifolia include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
